review_comment: `EncoderDecoderModel` class has `main_input_name = "input_ids"`, which is the same as (almost all) text encoder models. With this (nested) 2nd condtition,  `main_input_name` variable won't be set and just `None`, causing issue afterward.
we can set to this value no matter if `self.model.encoder.main_input_name != self.model.main_input_name` is True or False.
